response.justification: Strong full-stack candidate with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Solid match on primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly aligning with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates engineering craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source contributions. Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java depth, but the breadth and quality of experience strongly suggest interview-worthiness.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with AI agents and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React background across multiple senior roles including Optilyz and RIDE Capital
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin experience; Java work was years ago on robotics/mobile tooling
Heavy DLang focus in mid-career may indicate less depth in the JVM ecosystem the role's secondary stack requires

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent / MCP infrastructure experience
